methodsAttempted.query: QS 91-100 official university AI tools discovery
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search and targeted official-page fetches were used across QS91-100. Tool-level evidence was found for Sheffield, Uppsala, Alberta, UTS, and KIT.

artifacts.summary: QS91-100 AI tools discovery found official tool-level records for Sheffield, Uppsala, Alberta, UTS, and KIT.

artifacts.title: uapt-ai-tools-qs-91-100-20260712 AI tools extraction
artifacts.summary: Validated QS91-100 AI tools extraction with official tool-level records for Sheffield, Uppsala, Alberta, UTS, and KIT.
limitations: This tracker summarizes source-backed public evidence and is not legal, academic-integrity, or procurement advice.
Generic AI examples, completed pilots, and pages without access/procurement evidence were not expanded into current tool records.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Google Gemini is listed for The University of Sheffield in an official university AI tools source. Derived availability: allowed. Derived endorsement type: officially endorsed.
artifacts.normalizedValue: {"tool":"gemini","rawToolName":"Google Gemini","description":"Institutionally approved AI tool listed by the University of Sheffield for student generative AI use.","howToObtain":"Access Gemini through the linked Google Gemini app.","costToUser":"Not specified.","availability":"allowed","endorsementType":"officially_endorsed"}

artifacts.claimText: KI-Toolbox is listed for KIT, Karlsruhe Institute of Technology in an official university AI tools source. Derived availability: conditionally allowed. Derived endorsement type: self hosted system.
artifacts.normalizedValue: {"tool":"self_deploy","rawToolName":"KI-Toolbox","description":"KIT AI toolbox that gives KIT employees and students access to local and external language models through a web interface and API.","howToObtain":"Use the KI-Toolbox web interface with KIT credentials after completing the AI Competency Module; off-campus use may require KIT VPN.","costToUser":"Monthly standard budget for external models; direct user cost not specified.","availability":"conditionally_allowed","endorsementType":"self_hosted_system"}

artifacts.sourceTitle: KIT - ZML - GenAI@KIT - KI-Toolbox
KIT - ZML - GenAI@KIT - KI-Toolbox
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: The KI-Toolbox gives all KIT employees access to various local and external language models (LLMs). There are two separate ways to use them: a web interface for interactive use and an application programming interface (API).
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The KI-Toolbox gives all KIT employees access to various local and external language models (LLMs). There are two separate ways to use them: a web interface for interactive use and an application programming interface (API).
